evidently.launch.executionstatusobject.C: Use this structure to start and stop the launch.

evidently.launch.executionstatusobject.D.Description: If you are using AWS CloudFormation to stop this launch, specify either `COMPLETED` or `CANCELLED` here to indicate how to classify this experiment. If you omit this parameter, the default of `COMPLETED` is used.

evidently.launch.executionstatusobject.R.Description: If you are using AWS CloudFormation to stop this launch, this is an optional field that you can use to record why the launch is being stopped or cancelled.

evidently.launch.executionstatusobject.S.Description: To start the launch now, specify `START` for this parameter. If this launch is currently running and you want to stop it now, specify `STOP`.
